# openwrt-docs4ai - LLM Routing Index
> For a flat file listing, see [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)

> **Version:** openwrt/openwrt@82d9859, openwrt/luci@405d4af, jow-/ucode@763d8c3
> **Total Context Available:** ~439660 tokens

## Guides
- [cookbook](./cookbook/llms.txt): Task-oriented OpenWrt guides: era-appropriate patterns, common AI mistakes, architecture overview, and cross-component howtos. (~18852 tokens)

## Core Daemons
- [openwrt-hotplug](./openwrt-hotplug/llms.txt): Hotplug event subsystem: netifd-injected environment variables and /etc/hotplug.d/ script interfaces. (~1412 tokens)
- [procd](./procd/llms.txt): OpenWrt process manager and init system: procd init scripts, service registration, and supervised process lifecycle. (~352 tokens)
- [uci](./uci/llms.txt): Unified Configuration Interface: UCI CLI tool, API bindings, and default configuration schemas for OpenWrt packages. (~420 tokens)

## Scripting & Logic
- [luci](./luci/llms.txt): LuCI web interface framework: JavaScript client API for forms, UCI bindings, RPC, DOM, and UI widgets. (~19723 tokens)
- [ucode](./ucode/llms.txt): ucode scripting language: standard library, runtime modules (fs, ubus, uci, uloop, nl80211, rtnl), and C API. (~80860 tokens)

## Ecosystem
- [luci-examples](./luci-examples/llms.txt): LuCI community application examples: full plugin source code for Docker, statistics, DDNS, and more. (~100272 tokens)
- [openwrt-core](./openwrt-core/llms.txt): OpenWrt buildroot core packages: early boot firmware, kernel module infrastructure, and base-files. (~23147 tokens)

## Manuals
- [wiki](./wiki/llms.txt): OpenWrt project documentation: developer guides, architecture references, release notes, and hardware support. (~194622 tokens)

## Complete Aggregation
If your context window permits, you may fetch the flat URL index:
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt): Exhaustive flat catalog of generated AI-facing documents. (~0 tokens)
